title: Conversion functions and RegisterAll updates
description:
Update pkg/stdlib/core.go with:

1. Add 3 new conversion functions IN core.go:
   - BoolToString: 1 Bool arg, returns heap-allocated "true" or "false" string
   - CharToInt: 1 Char arg, returns IntVal(int64(args[0].AsChar()))
   - IntToChar: 1 Int arg, validates range [0, 0x10FFFF] and utf8.ValidRune, returns CharVal

2. Add import "unicode/utf8" to core.go

3. Update RegisterAll() function to add ALL new registrations:

   Map operations:
   r.Register("map_new", MapNew) through r.Register("map_map", MapMapValues) — 12 functions

   Math:
   r.Register("sin", Sin) through r.Register("clamp", Clamp) — 16 functions

   Time/Random:
   r.Register("time_now_ms", TimeNowMs) through r.Register("random_choice", RandomChoice) — 5 functions

   Conversions:
   r.Register("bool_to_string", BoolToString), r.Register("char_to_int", CharToInt), r.Register("int_to_char", IntToChar)

   Array:
   r.Register("array_find", ArrayFind) through r.Register("array_slice", ArraySlice) — 12 functions

   String:
   r.Register("string_index_of", StringIndexOf) through r.Register("string_join", StringJoin) — 6 functions

   Filesystem:
   r.Register("file_exists", FileExists) through r.Register("file_size", FileSize) — 8 functions

See goal spec sections 3-8 Registration subsections for exact names.
